hero.name: Javier Maroto
hero.description: I build production apps from infrastructure to UI. Python, FastAPI, React, local LLMs, Docker. Currently shipping SportEvent, FitDash and WinSvalinn.

about.title: About
about.paragraph: Full-Stack Engineer focused on Python and AI applications. I design, code and deploy complete products: FastAPI backends, React 19 + TypeScript frontends, PostgreSQL with pgvector, Docker-based infra and local language models with Ollama. I come from the sysadmin world, so I think about scaling, security and observability from day one.
about.availability: Available for remote roles worldwide and on-site opportunities across Europe and Spain.
